name: Goobee The Fluffy Craft
description: Goobee is a humanoid light beige craft, with a rounded square-shaped head which has tufts of fluff on the forehead and cheeks.She has light yellowish blush underneath her eyes, with red freckles. She has a light yellowish torso, with tufts of fluff on the neck. She has long, thick, noodley black strings as arms, with the left hand being light blue on the right side with red claws- and the right hand being light red on the left side with blue ones. Both hands are rounded and large. She also has light yellowish orange stripes on the knees and ankles
creator: PuroDarkness
